texto: Birth unites women in the power of oneness
autor: the extraordinary gift we deeply share as mothers. Belly dance for birth reflects this very same essence of life and love.
explicacao: Citação de the extraordinary gift we deeply share as mothers. Belly dance for birth reflects this very same essence of life and love. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Birth unites women in the power of oneness” articula reflexao, maha-al-musa, birth em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
